items.claim: Patty Pimblett is more durable than Benoit Saint Denis on the feet.
items.quote: I think Patty Pimpblelet is going to be the one more likely to eat all those shots.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis lands four takedowns per 15 minutes.
items.quote: He's landing four takedowns per 15 minutes, right?

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis makes frequent mistakes in grappling, such as giving up position and ending up on bottom.
items.quote: this guy makes a ton of mistakes on the ground. You know, we can go back to the regional scene. I mean, this guy's giving up position, you know, uh, submission over position, ending up on bottom.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is reckless and careless in the grappling, often leaving his neck exposed.
items.quote: he's very wild and reckless and kind of careless at times in the grappling. Like he'll he'll leave his neck out there.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has only one win in the last nine years.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has one win in the last nine years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has not fought in five years. He's on a fiveyear layoff.

items.claim: Max Holloway is beginning to show signs of slowing down.
items.quote: I do think Holloway is starting to slow down a tad.
I think Connor might have some success early landing some big shots against the Hitittable Holloway
